ab: Manga’ay caliwen ako ko payso^ iso haw?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: Nga’ay to. Pina^ ko picaliw iso?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: Matawal ako miala^ ko payso^. Caliwen ho^ ako ko payso^ iso haw!
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Awaa:y ko niawitan ako to payso^.
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: Mapawan kako mihakiwid to payso^. Caliwen ho^ ako ko payso^ iso haw!
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Na’ay. Caay ho panokas kiso toya nacila:ay.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: Nga’ay caliwen ako ko fodoy iso haw?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: Nga’ay to. Lonok han.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: Nga’ay caliwen ako ko codad iso haw?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: Mapacaliw ako ci Panay.
en: B: I lent it to Pany.

ab: Pacaliwen ho^ kako to koliciw iso haw?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: Nga’ay to. Panokasen anocila^.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: Ma’orad to. Awa^ ko cacelakan ako. Pacaliwen ho^ kako to cacelakan haw?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: Cecay ko cacelakan, makomod kita.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: Oya nipacaliwan iso i takowanan kina codad, panokasen ako i tisowanan.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: Ano ira ko kacifaloco’an iso a miasip, pasowal hato kako.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: Anohacowa^ kako panokas tona payso^ i tisowanan?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: Aka ka caroh, itiya hato cipayso^ kiso.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It's okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: Anohacowa^ kiso a panokas toya payso^ i takowanan?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: Anocila^.
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: Anohacowa^ kiso a panokas toya codad?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: Mapanokas to ako inacila^ kiyami?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: O nipacaliwan ni Kacaw i tisowanan kina impic hay?
en: A: Did Kacaw lend you this pen?

ab: Hay, o nicaliwan ako anini^ i ciiraan.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: O nicaliwan iso ci Kacawan kina impic hay?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Kacaw?

ab: Caay, o nicakayan ni ina^.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: Awaay to ko cilah, oli caliwen ho i ci Panayan.
en: A: We're out of salt, go borrow some from Panay.

ab: Hay, tayra kako.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: Oli, panokasen koya payso^ han ci Panay.
en: B: Go and ask Panay to return the money.

ab: Pina^ payso^ koya nicaliwan niira?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
